title: Suffer That Thou Canst Not Shift.
content:
Does fortune rend thee? Bear with thy hard fate:
    Virtuous instructions ne'er are delicate.
    Say, does she frown? still countermand her threats:
    Virtue best loves those children that she beats.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Suffer That Thou Canst Not Shift."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
